chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANO Crl. Misc. Appln. No.D-05 of 2025. Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection ‘A’. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of M.A.No.4040/2025. 11.09.2025 Mr. Muhammad Ibrahim Lashari, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Addl. P. G. -.-.-.-.-.- It reflected from the case file that the trial Court has taken cognizance against the applicant, therefore, purpose of instant application in view of dicta laid down by the learned apex Court in case of Director General, Anti-Corruption Establishment, Lahore and others v. Muhammad Akram Khan and others (PLD 2013 Supreme Court 401), has become infructuous, therefore, it is hereby dismissed along with listed application. Judge Judge M Yousuf Panhwar/**
